---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug to help us improve SiraGPT
title: "[BUG] <short description>"
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces (in code
blocks) if available.

## Screenshots / recordings

If applicable, attach screenshots or a short screen recording.

## Environment

- SiraGPT version / commit SHA:
- Node version (`node -v`):
- Browser + version:
- OS:
- Deployment: [local / Docker / production]

## Logs

```
Paste relevant logs here (redact secrets / PII).
```

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (recent changes, related issues, etc.).

## Severity (your estimate)

- [ ] Critical — data loss, security exposure, total outage
- [ ] High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — feature degraded, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — cosmetic / minor

---

> ⚠️ **Security issues**: do **not** file a public issue. Follow
> [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead.
